MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-04-2017 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT JOSEPH CHAVEZ'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. JACKSON; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
